description_long: This house features a two-story structure with a prominent hip roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by slender columns, a balcony above with a glass railing, and a mix of tall, narrow windows and a main entry door. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of beige and light brown tones, with some modern trim accents. The side and rear elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. The house also has a cantilevered section and a flat-roofed carport or patio area extending from the main structure. The overall design blends modern and traditional elements, making it suitable for suburban or urban neighborhoods.
description: A two-story house with a hip roof, covered porch, balcony, and a mix of tall windows, finished in beige and brown tones with modern accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered porch with columns, balcony with glass railing, and multiple tall windows.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by the hip roof and plain wall, with the carport/patio structure visible extending from the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with a simple beige wall, minimal window openings, and a small overhang visible on the side.
description_view_3: Back view showing two upper windows, three tall lower windows, and a secondary entry with a small overhang and adjacent patio structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with tall vertical strips and grouped windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with slender columns, a modern door, and an overhanging balcony above.
